title: Draper 48922 Plain Slot Screwdriver with Soft Grip Handle, 5.0mm x 100mm , Blue
description: From the manufacturer About Draper Tools We’re an independent family business with over a century of success to recommend us. But that’s only the start of the story. Draper is our core range of quality tools, suitable for use by the enthusiast and the tradesperson. The Draper brand covers all department products. DIY tools. Soft Grip Plain Slot Screwdriver Chrome vanadium steel blades hardened, tempered with satin chrome plated finish and sand blasted tips. Soft grip handle with moulded inserts. in individual storage hanger with barcode on reverse. • Soft grip handles with moulded inserts • Chrome vanadium steel blades hardened, tempered with satin chrome plated finish with sand blasted tips
